tEn: Feature Pyramid Networks for Object Detection
tZh: 特征金字塔网络用于目标检测
sEn: Feature Pyramid Networks (FPN) improve multi-scale object detection by leveraging deep convolutional networks' inherent pyramid hierarchy with minimal extra cost.
sZh: 特征金字塔网络（FPN）利用深度卷积网络固有的金字塔层次结构，以极小的额外成本提升多尺度目标检测性能。
absEn: Feature pyramids are a basic component in recognition systems for detecting objects at different scales. But recent deep learning object detectors have avoided pyramid representations, in part because they are compute and memory intensive. In this paper, we exploit the inherent multi-scale, pyramidal hierarchy of deep convolutional networks to construct feature pyramids with marginal extra cost. A top-down architecture with lateral connections is developed for building high-level semantic feature maps at all scales. This architecture, called a Feature Pyramid Network (FPN), shows significant improvement as a generic feature extractor in several applications. Using FPN in a basic Faster R-CNN system, our method achieves state-of-the-art single-model results on the COCO detection benchmark without bells and whistles, surpassing all existing single-model entries including those from the COCO 2016 challenge winners. In addition, our method can run at 5 FPS on a GPU and thus is a practical and accurate solution to multi-scale object detection. Code will be made publicly available.
absZh: 特征金字塔是识别系统中用于检测不同尺度目标的基本组件。但最近的深度学习目标检测器避免了金字塔表示，部分原因是其计算和内存密集。本文利用深度卷积网络固有的多尺度金字塔层次结构，以极小的额外成本构建特征金字塔。我们开发了一种带有侧向连接的top-down架构，用于构建所有尺度的高层语义特征图。这种架构称为特征金字塔网络（FPN），在多个应用中作为通用特征提取器显示出显著改进。在基本的Faster R-CNN系统中使用FPN，我们的方法在COCO检测基准上实现了最先进的单模型结果，无需任何技巧，超越了所有现有的单模型参赛者，包括COCO 2016挑战赛的获胜者。此外，我们的方法可以在GPU上以5 FPS运行，因此是一种实用且准确的多尺度目标检测解决方案。代码将公开。

contrib.en: Proposes Feature Pyramid Network (FPN) combining low-resolution strong semantics with high-resolution weak features via top-down pathway and lateral connections.
contrib.zh: 提出特征金字塔网络（FPN），通过自上而下路径和横向连接，将低分辨率强语义特征与高分辨率弱语义特征结合。

contrib.en: Achieves state-of-the-art single-model results on COCO detection benchmark using FPN with basic Faster R-CNN.
contrib.zh: 使用FPN与基础Faster R-CNN，在COCO检测基准上取得单模型最优结果。

contrib.en: Improves Average Recall (AR) by 8.0 points for bounding box proposals and boosts small object detection AR by 12.9 points.
contrib.zh: 边界框提议的平均召回率（AR）提升8.0点，小物体检测AR提升12.9点。

contrib.en: Enables end-to-end training with all scales and consistent train/test time usage, avoiding memory issues of image pyramids.
contrib.zh: 支持所有尺度的端到端训练，训练/测试一致使用，避免图像金字塔的内存问题。

contrib.en: Extends FPN to mask proposal generation, achieving 48.1 AR and 6-7 FPS, outperforming prior methods by over 8.3 AR.
contrib.zh: 将FPN扩展到掩码提议生成，达到48.1 AR和6-7 FPS，比先前方法AR提升超过8.3点。

contrib.en: Demonstrates that explicit multi-scale pyramid representations remain critical despite deep ConvNets' scale robustness.
contrib.zh: 证明尽管深度卷积网络具有尺度鲁棒性，显式多尺度金字塔表示仍然至关重要。

limits.en: Evaluation limited to ResNet backbones; performance on other architectures like Transformer not explored.
limits.zh: 评估仅限于ResNet骨干网络，未探索Transformer等其他架构的性能。

limits.en: Method relies on predefined anchor scales and aspect ratios; may not generalize to arbitrary object shapes.
limits.zh: 方法依赖预定义的锚点尺度和长宽比，可能无法泛化到任意物体形状。

limits.en: FPN adds extra layers and computations, though marginal; may not be optimal for extremely resource-constrained settings.
limits.zh: FPN增加了额外层和计算量（虽小），在极端资源受限场景下可能非最优。

limits.en: Experiments conducted on COCO dataset; generalization to other domains (e.g., medical imaging) not validated.
limits.zh: 实验在COCO数据集上进行，未验证在其他领域（如医学影像）的泛化性。

limits.en: Shared classifier/regressor heads assume uniform semantics across pyramid levels; may fail if semantic gaps are large.
limits.zh: 共享分类器/回归器头假设金字塔各层语义一致，语义差距大时可能失效。

items.en: Feature pyramids are a basic component in recognition systems for detecting objects at different scales. But recent deep learning object detectors have avoided pyramid representations, in part because they are compute and memory intensive. In this paper, we exploit the inherent multi-scale, pyramidal hierarchy of deep convolutional networks to construct feature pyramids with marginal extra cost. A top-down architecture with lateral connections is developed for building high-level semantic feature maps at all scales. This architecture, called a Feature Pyramid Network (FPN), shows significant improvement as a generic feature extractor in several applications. Using FPN in a basic Faster R-CNN system, our method achieves state-of-the-art single-model results on the COCO detection benchmark without bells and whistles, surpassing all existing single-model entries including those from the COCO 2016 challenge winners. In addition, our method can run at 6 FPS on a GPU and thus is a practical and accurate solution to multi-scale object detection. Code will be made publicly available.
items.zh: 特征金字塔是识别系统中用于检测不同尺度物体的基本组件。但最近的深度学习目标检测器避免使用金字塔表示，部分原因是其计算和内存密集。本文利用深度卷积网络固有的多尺度金字塔层次结构，以极小的额外代价构建特征金字塔。我们开发了一种带有侧向连接的top-down架构，用于在所有尺度上构建高层语义特征图。这种架构称为特征金字塔网络（FPN），作为通用特征提取器在多个应用中显示出显著改进。在基本的Faster R-CNN系统中使用FPN，我们的方法在COCO检测基准上无需任何技巧即达到单模型最优结果，超越了所有现有单模型条目，包括COCO 2016挑战赛获胜者。此外，我们的方法在GPU上可以6 FPS运行，因此是一种实用且准确的多尺度目标检测解决方案。代码将公开提供。

items.en: Recognizing objects at vastly different scales is a fundamental challenge in computer vision. Feature pyramids built upon image pyramids (for short we call these featurized image pyramids) form the basis of a standard solution [1] (Fig. 1(a)). These pyramids are scale-invariant in the sense that an object’s scale change is offset by shifting its level in the pyramid. Intuitively, this property enables a model to detect objects across a large range of scales by scanning the model over both positions and pyramid levels.
items.zh: 识别不同尺度的物体是计算机视觉中的基本挑战。基于图像金字塔构建的特征金字塔（简称特征化图像金字塔）构成了标准解决方案的基础[1]（图1(a)）。这些金字塔具有尺度不变性，因为物体的尺度变化通过其在金字塔中的层级偏移来补偿。直观上，这一特性使得模型能够通过扫描位置和金字塔层级来检测大范围尺度的物体。

items.en: Featurized image pyramids were heavily used in the era of hand-engineered features [5, 25]. They were so critical that object detectors like DPM [7] required dense scale sampling to achieve good results (e.g., 10 scales per octave). For recognition tasks, engineered features have largely been replaced with features computed by deep convolutional networks (ConvNets) [19, 20]. Aside from being capable of representing higher-level semantics, ConvNets are also more robust to variance in scale and thus facilitate recognition from features computed on a single input scale [15, 11, 29] (Fig. 1(b)). But even with this robustness, pyramids are still needed to get the most accurate results. All recent top entries in the ImageNet [33] and COCO [21] detection challenges use multi-scale testing on featurized image pyramids (e.g., [16, 35]). The principle advantage of featurizing each level of an image pyramid is that it produces a multi-scale feature representation in which all levels are semantically strong, including the high-resolution levels.
items.zh: 特征化图像金字塔在手工特征时代被广泛使用[5, 25]。它们如此关键，以至于像DPM[7]这样的目标检测器需要密集的尺度采样才能获得良好结果（例如，每倍频程10个尺度）。对于识别任务，手工特征已很大程度上被深度卷积网络（ConvNets）[19, 20]计算的特征所取代。除了能够表示更高层语义，ConvNets对尺度变化也更鲁棒，从而有助于从单一输入尺度的特征进行识别[15, 11, 29]（图1(b)）。但即使具有这种鲁棒性，金字塔仍然是获得最准确结果所必需的。ImageNet[33]和COCO[21]检测挑战中所有近期顶级条目都使用特征化图像金字塔的多尺度测试（例如[16, 35]）。对图像金字塔的每一层进行特征化的主要优点是产生一个多尺度特征表示，其中所有层级（包括高分辨率层级）都具有强语义。

items.capEn: Figure 1: (a) Using an image pyramid to build a feature pyramid. Features are computed on each of the image scales independently, which is slow. (b) Recent detection systems have opted to use only single scale features for faster detection. (c) An alternative is to reuse the pyramidal feature hierarchy computed by a ConvNet as if it were a featurized image pyramid. (d) Our proposed Feature Pyramid Network (FPN) is fast like (b) and (c), but more accurate. In this figure, feature maps are indicate by blue outlines and thicker outlines denote semantically stronger features.
items.capZh: 图1：(a) 使用图像金字塔构建特征金字塔。在每个图像尺度上独立计算特征，速度慢。(b) 最近的检测系统选择仅使用单尺度特征以实现更快的检测。(c) 另一种方法是重用ConvNet计算的金字塔特征层次结构，将其视为特征化图像金字塔。(d) 我们提出的特征金字塔网络（FPN）像(b)和(c)一样快，但更准确。图中特征图用蓝色轮廓表示，较粗的轮廓表示语义更强的特征。

items.en: Nevertheless, featurizing each level of an image pyramid has obvious limitations. Inference time increases considerably (e.g., by four times [11]), making this approach impractical for real applications. Moreover, training deep networks end-to-end on an image pyramid is infeasible in terms of memory, and so, if exploited, image pyramids are used only at test time [15, 11, 16, 35], which creates an inconsistency between train/test-time inference. For these reasons, Fast and Faster R-CNN [11, 29] opt to not use featurized image pyramids under default settings.
items.zh: 然而，对图像金字塔的每一层进行特征化存在明显局限性。推理时间显著增加（例如，增加四倍[11]），使得该方法在实际应用中不实用。此外，在图像金字塔上端到端训练深度网络在内存上不可行，因此如果使用图像金字塔，则仅在测试时使用[15, 11, 16, 35]，这造成了训练/测试推理之间的不一致。由于这些原因，Fast R-CNN和Faster R-CNN[11, 29]在默认设置下选择不使用特征化图像金字塔。

items.en: However, image pyramids are not the only way to compute a multi-scale feature representation. A deep ConvNet computes a feature hierarchy layer by layer, and with subsampling layers the feature hierarchy has an inherent multi-scale, pyramidal shape. This in-network feature hierarchy produces feature maps of different spatial resolutions, but introduces large semantic gaps caused by different depths. The high-resolution maps have low-level features that harm their representational capacity for object recognition.
items.zh: 然而，图像金字塔并不是计算多尺度特征表示的唯一方法。深度ConvNet逐层计算特征层次结构，通过下采样层，特征层次结构具有固有的多尺度金字塔形状。这种网络内的特征层次结构产生不同空间分辨率的特征图，但由于不同深度引入了较大的语义差距。高分辨率图具有低级特征，这损害了它们对物体识别的表示能力。

items.en: The Single Shot Detector (SSD) [22] is one of the first attempts at using a ConvNet’s pyramidal feature hierarchy as if it were a featurized image pyramid (Fig. 1(c)). Ideally, the SSD-style pyramid would reuse the multi-scale feature maps from different layers computed in the forward pass and thus come free of cost. But to avoid using low-level features SSD foregoes reusing already computed layers and instead builds the pyramid starting from high up in the network (e.g., conv4_3 of VGG nets [36]) and then by adding several new layers. Thus it misses the opportunity to reuse the higher-resolution maps of the feature hierarchy. We show that these are important for detecting small objects.
items.zh: 单次检测器（SSD）[22]是首批尝试使用ConvNet的金字塔特征层次结构作为特征化图像金字塔的方法之一（图1(c)）。理想情况下，SSD风格的金字塔会重用前向传播中从不同层计算的多尺度特征图，因此无需额外成本。但为了避免使用低级特征，SSD放弃重用已计算的层，而是从网络高层开始构建金字塔（例如，VGG网络的conv4_3[36]），然后添加几个新层。因此它错过了重用特征层次结构中更高分辨率图的机会。我们表明这些对于检测小物体很重要。

items.en: The goal of this paper is to naturally leverage the pyramidal shape of a ConvNet’s feature hierarchy while creating a feature pyramid that has strong semantics at all scales. To achieve this goal, we rely on an architecture that combines low-resolution, semantically strong features with high-resolution, semantically weak features via a top-down pathway and lateral connections (Fig. 1(d)). The result is a feature pyramid that has rich semantics at all levels and is built quickly from a single input image scale. In other words, we show how to create in-network feature pyramids that can be used to replace featurized image pyramids without sacrificing representational power, speed, or memory.
items.zh: 本文的目标是自然利用ConvNet特征层次结构的金字塔形状，同时创建一个在所有尺度上都具有强语义的特征金字塔。为实现这一目标，我们采用一种架构，通过top-down路径和侧向连接将低分辨率、强语义特征与高分辨率、弱语义特征相结合（图1(d)）。结果是一个在所有层级上都具有丰富语义的特征金字塔，并且从单个输入图像尺度快速构建。换句话说，我们展示了如何创建网络内的特征金字塔，以替代特征化图像金字塔，而不牺牲表示能力、速度或内存。

items.en: Similar architectures adopting top-down and skip connections are popular in recent research [28, 17, 8, 26]. Their goals are to produce a single high-level feature map of a fine resolution on which the predictions are to be made (Fig. 2 top). On the contrary, our method leverages the architecture as a feature pyramid where predictions (e.g., object detections) are independently made on each level (Fig. 2 bottom). Our model echoes a featurized image pyramid, which has not been explored in these works.
items.zh: 采用top-down和跳跃连接的类似架构在近期研究中很流行[28, 17, 8, 26]。它们的目标是产生一个单一的高分辨率高层语义特征图，并在其上做出预测（图2顶部）。相反，我们的方法将该架构用作特征金字塔，其中预测（例如目标检测）在每个层级上独立进行（图2底部）。我们的模型类似于特征化图像金字塔，这在上述工作中尚未探索。

items.en: We evaluate our method, called a Feature Pyramid Network (FPN), in various systems for detection and segmentation [11, 29, 27]. Without bells and whistles, we report a state-of-the-art single-model result on the challenging COCO detection benchmark [21] simply based on FPN and a basic Faster R-CNN detector [29], surpassing all existing heavily-engineered single-model entries of competition winners. In ablation experiments, we find that for bounding box proposals, FPN significantly increases the Average Recall (AR) by 8.0 points; for object detection, it improves the COCO-style Average Precision (AP) by 2.3 points and PASCAL-style AP by 3.8 points, over a strong single-scale baseline of Faster R-CNN on ResNets [16]. Our method is also easily extended to mask proposals and improves both instance segmentation AR and speed over state-of-the-art methods that heavily depend on image pyramids.
items.zh: 我们在多种检测和分割系统中评估了我们的方法，称为特征金字塔网络（FPN）[11, 29, 27]。无需任何技巧，我们仅基于FPN和基本的Faster R-CNN检测器[29]在具有挑战性的COCO检测基准[21]上报告了单模型最优结果，超越了所有现有竞争获胜者的精心设计的单模型条目。在消融实验中，我们发现对于边界框提议，FPN将平均召回率（AR）显著提高了8.0个点；对于目标检测，在ResNet[16]上基于强单尺度基线的Faster R-CNN，它将COCO风格的平均精度（AP）提高了2.3个点，PASCAL风格AP提高了3.8个点。我们的方法也易于扩展到掩膜提议，并提高了实例分割AR和速度，优于严重依赖图像金字塔的现有最优方法。

items.en: In addition, our pyramid structure can be trained end-to-end with all scales and is used consistently at train/test time, which would be memory-infeasible using image pyramids. As a result, FPNs are able to achieve higher accuracy than all existing state-of-the-art methods. Moreover, this improvement is achieved without increasing testing time over the single-scale baseline. We believe these advances will facilitate future research and applications. Our code will be made publicly available.
items.zh: 此外，我们的金字塔结构可以端到端训练所有尺度，并在训练/测试时一致使用，而使用图像金字塔在内存上不可行。因此，FPN能够实现比所有现有最优方法更高的准确率。此外，这种改进是在不增加测试时间的情况下实现的，相对于单尺度基线。我们相信这些进展将促进未来的研究和应用。我们的代码将公开提供。

items.capEn: Figure 2: Top: a top-down architecture with skip connections, where predictions are made on the finest level (e.g., [28]). Bottom: our model that has a similar structure but leverages it as a feature pyramid, with predictions made independently at all levels.
items.capZh: 图2：顶部：带有跳跃连接的top-down架构，其中预测在最高分辨率层级上进行（例如[28]）。底部：我们的模型具有类似结构，但将其用作特征金字塔，在所有层级上独立进行预测。

items.en: SIFT features [25] were originally extracted at scale-space extrema and used for feature point matching. HOG features [5], and later SIFT features as well, were computed densely over entire image pyramids. These HOG and SIFT pyramids have been used in numerous works for image classification, object detection, human pose estimation, and more. There has also been significant interest in computing featurized image pyramids quickly. Dollár et al. [6] demonstrated fast pyramid computation by first computing a sparsely sampled (in scale) pyramid and then interpolating missing levels. Before HOG and SIFT, early work on face detection with ConvNets [38, 32] computed shallow networks over image pyramids to detect faces across scales.
items.zh: SIFT特征[25]最初在尺度空间极值点提取，用于特征点匹配。HOG特征[5]以及后来的SIFT特征在整个图像金字塔上密集计算。这些HOG和SIFT金字塔已被广泛用于图像分类、目标检测、人体姿态估计等。快速计算特征化图像金字塔也引起了极大兴趣。Dollár等人[6]通过首先计算稀疏采样（在尺度上）的金字塔，然后插值缺失层级，展示了快速金字塔计算。在HOG和SIFT之前，使用ConvNet进行人脸检测的早期工作[38, 32]在图像金字塔上计算浅层网络以检测不同尺度的人脸。

items.en: With the development of modern deep ConvNets [19], object detectors like OverFeat [34] and R-CNN [12] showed dramatic improvements in accuracy. OverFeat adopted a strategy similar to early neural network face detectors by applying a ConvNet as a sliding window detector on an image pyramid. R-CNN adopted a region proposal-based strategy [37] in which each proposal was scale-normalized before classifying with a ConvNet. SPPnet [15] demonstrated that such region-based detectors could be applied much more efficiently on feature maps extracted on a single image scale. Recent and more accurate detection methods like Fast R-CNN [11] and Faster R-CNN [29] advocate using features computed from a single scale, because it offers a good trade-off between accuracy and speed. Multi-scale detection, however, still performs better, especially for small objects.
items.zh: 随着现代深度ConvNet[19]的发展，像OverFeat[34]和R-CNN[12]这样的目标检测器在准确率上显示出显著改进。OverFeat采用了类似于早期神经网络人脸检测器的策略，将ConvNet作为滑动窗口检测器应用于图像金字塔。R-CNN采用了基于区域提议的策略[37]，其中每个提议在通过ConvNet分类之前进行尺度归一化。SPPnet[15]表明，这种基于区域的检测器可以更高效地应用于在单一图像尺度上提取的特征图。最近更准确的检测方法如Fast R-CNN[11]和Faster R-CNN[29]提倡使用从单一尺度计算的特征，因为它在准确率和速度之间提供了良好的权衡。然而，多尺度检测仍然表现更好，特别是对于小物体。

items.en: A number of recent approaches improve detection and segmentation by using different layers in a ConvNet. FCN [24] sums partial scores for each category over multiple scales to compute semantic segmentations. Hypercolumns [13] uses a similar method for object instance segmentation. Several other approaches (HyperNet [18], ParseNet [23], and ION [2]) concatenate features of multiple layers before computing predictions, which is equivalent to summing transformed features. SSD [22] and MS-CNN [3] predict objects at multiple layers of the feature hierarchy without combining features or scores.
items.zh: 许多近期方法通过使用ConvNet中的不同层来改进检测和分割。FCN[24]在多个尺度上对每个类别的部分分数求和以计算语义分割。Hypercolumns[13]使用类似方法进行物体实例分割。其他几种方法（HyperNet[18]、ParseNet[23]和ION[2]）在计算预测之前连接多个层的特征，这相当于对变换后的特征求和。SSD[22]和MS-CNN[3]在特征层次结构的多个层上预测物体，而不组合特征或分数。

items.en: There are recent methods exploiting lateral/skip connections that associate low-level feature maps across resolutions and semantic levels, including U-Net [31] and SharpMask [28] for segmentation, Recombinator networks [17] for face detection, and Stacked Hourglass networks [26] for keypoint estimation. Ghiasi et al. [8] present a Laplacian pyramid presentation for FCNs to progressively refine segmentation. Although these methods adopt architectures with pyramidal shapes, they are unlike featurized image pyramids [5, 7, 34] where predictions are made independently at all levels, see Fig. 2. In fact, for the pyramidal architecture in Fig. 2 (top), image pyramids are still needed to recognize objects across multiple scales [28].
items.zh: 最近有方法利用侧向/跳跃连接，将不同分辨率和语义级别的低级特征图关联起来，包括用于分割的U-Net[31]和SharpMask[28]，用于人脸检测的Recombinator网络[17]，以及用于关键点估计的Stacked Hourglass网络[26]。Ghiasi等人[8]提出了用于FCN的拉普拉斯金字塔表示，以逐步细化分割。尽管这些方法采用了金字塔形状的架构，但它们不同于特征化图像金字塔[5, 7, 34]，后者在所有层级上独立进行预测，见图2。事实上，对于图2（顶部）的金字塔架构，仍然需要图像金字塔来识别多个尺度的物体[28]。

items.en: Our goal is to leverage a ConvNet’s pyramidal feature hierarchy, which has semantics from low to high levels, and build a feature pyramid with high-level semantics throughout. The resulting Feature Pyramid Network is general-purpose and in this paper we focus on sliding window proposers (Region Proposal Network, RPN for short) [29] and region-based detectors (Fast R-CNN) [11]. We also generalize FPNs to instance segmentation proposals in Sec. 6.
items.zh: 我们的目标是利用ConvNet的金字塔特征层次结构（具有从低到高的语义），并构建一个具有全局高层语义的特征金字塔。得到的特征金字塔网络是通用的，本文中我们专注于滑动窗口提议器（区域提议网络，简称RPN）[29]和基于区域的检测器（Fast R-CNN）[11]。我们还在第6节将FPN推广到实例分割提议。

items.en: Our method takes a single-scale image of an arbitrary size as input, and outputs proportionally sized feature maps at multiple levels, in a fully convolutional fashion. This process is independent of the backbone convolutional architectures (e.g., [19, 36, 16]), and in this paper we present results using ResNets [16]. The construction of our pyramid involves a bottom-up pathway, a top-down pathway, and lateral connections, as introduced in the following.
items.zh: 我们的方法以任意大小的单尺度图像作为输入，并以全卷积方式输出多个层级的比例特征图。该过程独立于骨干卷积架构（例如[19, 36, 16]），本文我们使用ResNet[16]展示结果。金字塔的构建包括bottom-up路径、top-down路径和侧向连接，如下所述。

items.en: The bottom-up pathway is the feedforward computation of the backbone ConvNet, which computes a feature hierarchy consisting of feature maps at several scales with a scaling step of 2. There are often many layers producing output maps of the same size and we say these layers are in the same network stage. For our feature pyramid, we define one pyramid level for each stage. We choose the output of the last layer of each stage as our reference set of feature maps, which we will enrich to create our pyramid. This choice is natural since the deepest layer of each stage should have the strongest features.
items.zh: bottom-up路径是骨干ConvNet的前馈计算，它计算一个特征层次结构，包含多个尺度的特征图，尺度步长为2。通常有许多层产生相同大小的输出图，我们说这些层位于同一网络阶段。对于我们的特征金字塔，我们为每个阶段定义一个金字塔层级。我们选择每个阶段最后一层的输出作为我们的参考特征图集，我们将对其进行丰富以创建金字塔。这种选择是自然的，因为每个阶段的最深层应具有最强的特征。

items.en: Specifically, for ResNets [16] we use the feature activations output by each stage’s last residual block. We denote the output of these last residual blocks as {C2,C3,C4,C5}subscript𝐶2subscript𝐶3subscript𝐶4subscript𝐶5\{C_{2},C_{3},C_{4},C_{5}\} for conv2, conv3, conv4, and conv5 outputs, and note that they have strides of {4, 8, 16, 32} pixels with respect to the input image. We do not include conv1 into the pyramid due to its large memory footprint.
items.zh: 具体来说，对于ResNet[16]，我们使用每个阶段最后一个残差块输出的特征激活。我们将这些最后残差块的输出记为{C2, C3, C4, C5}，分别对应conv2、conv3、conv4和conv5的输出，并注意它们相对于输入图像的步长分别为{4, 8, 16, 32}像素。由于内存占用大，我们不将conv1纳入金字塔。

items.en: The top-down pathway hallucinates higher resolution features by upsampling spatially coarser, but semantically stronger, feature maps from higher pyramid levels. These features are then enhanced with features from the bottom-up pathway via lateral connections. Each lateral connection merges feature maps of the same spatial size from the bottom-up pathway and the top-down pathway. The bottom-up feature map is of lower-level semantics, but its activations are more accurately localized as it was subsampled fewer times.
items.zh: 自上而下的路径通过上采样空间上更粗糙但语义上更强的特征图（来自更高金字塔层级）来生成更高分辨率的特征。这些特征随后通过横向连接与自下而上路径的特征进行增强。每个横向连接合并自下而上路径和自上而下路径中空间尺寸相同的特征图。自下而上的特征图具有较低层级的语义，但其激活值定位更准确，因为它被下采样的次数更少。

items.capEn: Figure 3: A building block illustrating the lateral connection and the top-down pathway, merged by addition.
items.capZh: 图3：一个构建块，展示了横向连接和自上而下的路径，通过加法合并。

items.en: Fig. 3 shows the building block that constructs our top-down feature maps. With a coarser-resolution feature map, we upsample the spatial resolution by a factor of 2 (using nearest neighbor upsampling for simplicity). The upsampled map is then merged with the corresponding bottom-up map (which undergoes a 1×\times1 convolutional layer to reduce channel dimensions) by element-wise addition. This process is iterated until the finest resolution map is generated. To start the iteration, we simply attach a 1×\times1 convolutional layer on C5subscript𝐶5C_{5} to produce the coarsest resolution map. Finally, we append a 3×3333\times 3 convolution on each merged map to generate the final feature map, which is to reduce the aliasing effect of upsampling. This final set of feature maps is called {P2,P3,P4,P5}subscript𝑃2subscript𝑃3subscript𝑃4subscript𝑃5\{P_{2},P_{3},P_{4},P_{5}\}, corresponding to {C2,C3,C4,C5}subscript𝐶2subscript𝐶3subscript𝐶4subscript𝐶5\{C_{2},C_{3},C_{4},C_{5}\} that are respectively of the same spatial sizes.
items.zh: 图3展示了构建我们自上而下特征图的构建块。对于一个分辨率较粗糙的特征图，我们通过因子2上采样空间分辨率（为简单起见使用最近邻上采样）。上采样后的图随后与对应的自下而上图（经过1×1卷积层以减少通道维度）通过逐元素加法合并。此过程迭代进行，直到生成最精细分辨率的图。为了开始迭代，我们简单地在C5上附加一个1×1卷积层以生成最粗糙分辨率的图。最后，我们在每个合并后的图上附加一个3×3卷积以生成最终特征图，这用于减少上采样的混叠效应。这组最终的特征图称为{P2, P3, P4, P5}，对应于{C2, C3, C4, C5}，它们分别具有相同的空间尺寸。

items.en: Because all levels of the pyramid use shared classifiers/regressors as in a traditional featurized image pyramid, we fix the feature dimension (numbers of channels, denoted as d𝑑d) in all the feature maps. We set d=256𝑑256d=256 in this paper and thus all extra convolutional layers have 256-channel outputs. There are no non-linearities in these extra layers, which we have empirically found to have minor impacts.
items.zh: 由于金字塔的所有层级都像传统的特征化图像金字塔一样使用共享的分类器/回归器，我们固定所有特征图中的特征维度（通道数，记为d）。本文中我们设置d=256，因此所有额外的卷积层都有256通道的输出。这些额外层中没有非线性，我们凭经验发现其影响很小。

items.en: Simplicity is central to our design and we have found that our model is robust to many design choices. We have experimented with more sophisticated blocks (e.g., using multi-layer residual blocks [16] as the connections) and observed marginally better results. Designing better connection modules is not the focus of this paper, so we opt for the simple design described above.
items.zh: 简洁性是我们设计的核心，我们发现我们的模型对许多设计选择具有鲁棒性。我们尝试了更复杂的模块（例如，使用多层残差块[16]作为连接），并观察到略微更好的结果。设计更好的连接模块不是本文的重点，因此我们选择了上述简单设计。

items.en: Our method is a generic solution for building feature pyramids inside deep ConvNets. In the following we adopt our method in RPN [29] for bounding box proposal generation and in Fast R-CNN [11] for object detection. To demonstrate the simplicity and effectiveness of our method, we make minimal modifications to the original systems of [29, 11] when adapting them to our feature pyramid.
items.zh: 我们的方法是在深度卷积网络内部构建特征金字塔的通用解决方案。下面我们将我们的方法应用于RPN[29]进行边界框提议生成，以及应用于Fast R-CNN[11]进行目标检测。为了展示我们方法的简洁性和有效性，我们在将[29,11]的原始系统适配到我们的特征金字塔时进行了最小程度的修改。

full.secZh: 4.1 用于RPN的特征金字塔网络

items.en: RPN [29] is a sliding-window class-agnostic object detector. In the original RPN design, a small subnetwork is evaluated on dense 3×\times3 sliding windows, on top of a single-scale convolutional feature map, performing object/non-object binary classification and bounding box regression. This is realized by a 3×\times3 convolutional layer followed by two sibling 1×\times1 convolutions for classification and regression, which we refer to as a network head. The object/non-object criterion and bounding box regression target are defined with respect to a set of reference boxes called anchors [29]. The anchors are of multiple pre-defined scales and aspect ratios in order to cover objects of different shapes.
items.zh: RPN[29]是一个滑动窗口的类别无关目标检测器。在原始的RPN设计中，一个小子网络在密集的3×3滑动窗口上评估，位于单尺度卷积特征图之上，执行目标/非目标二分类和边界框回归。这是通过一个3×3卷积层后跟两个并行的1×1卷积（用于分类和回归）实现的，我们称之为网络头部。目标/非目标标准和边界框回归目标相对于一组称为锚点[29]的参考框定义。锚点具有多个预定义的尺度和长宽比，以覆盖不同形状的目标。

items.en: We adapt RPN by replacing the single-scale feature map with our FPN. We attach a head of the same design (3×\times3 conv and two sibling 1×\times1 convs) to each level on our feature pyramid. Because the head slides densely over all locations in all pyramid levels, it is not necessary to have multi-scale anchors on a specific level. Instead, we assign anchors of a single scale to each level. Formally, we define the anchors to have areas of {322,642,1282,2562,5122}superscript322superscript642superscript1282superscript2562superscript5122\{32^{2},64^{2},128^{2},256^{2},512^{2}\} pixels on {P2,P3,P4,P5,P6}subscript𝑃2subscript𝑃3subscript𝑃4subscript𝑃5subscript𝑃6\{P_{2},P_{3},P_{4},P_{5},P_{6}\} respectively.111Here we introduce P6subscript𝑃6P_{6} only for covering a larger anchor scale of 5122superscript5122512^{2}. P6subscript𝑃6P_{6} is simply a stride two subsampling of P5subscript𝑃5P_{5}. P6subscript𝑃6P_{6} is not used by the Fast R-CNN detector in the next section. As in [29] we also use anchors of multiple aspect ratios {1\{1:2,22, 111:111, 222:1}1\} at each level. So in total there are 15 anchors over the pyramid.
items.zh: 我们通过用我们的FPN替换单尺度特征图来适配RPN。我们在特征金字塔的每个层级上附加一个相同设计的头部（3×3卷积和两个并行的1×1卷积）。由于头部在所有金字塔层级的所有位置密集滑动，因此不需要在特定层级上使用多尺度锚点。相反，我们为每个层级分配单一尺度的锚点。形式上，我们定义锚点的面积分别为{32^2, 64^2, 128^2, 256^2, 512^2}像素，对应{P2, P3, P4, P5, P6}。1这里我们引入P6仅用于覆盖更大的锚点尺度512^2。P6只是P5的步长为2的下采样。下一节的Fast R-CNN检测器不使用P6。如[29]中，我们还在每个层级使用多个长宽比的锚点{1:2, 1:1, 2:1}。因此金字塔上总共有15个锚点。

items.en: We assign training labels to the anchors based on their Intersection-over-Union (IoU) ratios with ground-truth bounding boxes as in [29]. Formally, an anchor is assigned a positive label if it has the highest IoU for a given ground-truth box or an IoU over 0.7 with any ground-truth box, and a negative label if it has IoU lower than 0.3 for all ground-truth boxes. Note that scales of ground-truth boxes are not explicitly used to assign them to the levels of the pyramid; instead, ground-truth boxes are associated with anchors, which have been assigned to pyramid levels. As such, we introduce no extra rules in addition to those in [29].
items.zh: 我们根据锚点与真实边界框的交并比（IoU）为锚点分配训练标签，如[29]中所述。形式上，如果一个锚点对于给定的真实框具有最高的IoU，或者与任何真实框的IoU超过0.7，则分配正标签；如果与所有真实框的IoU低于0.3，则分配负标签。注意，真实框的尺度并未显式用于将它们分配到金字塔层级；相反，真实框与锚点关联，而锚点已被分配到金字塔层级。因此，除了[29]中的规则外，我们没有引入额外规则。

items.en: We note that the parameters of the heads are shared across all feature pyramid levels; we have also evaluated the alternative without sharing parameters and observed similar accuracy. The good performance of sharing parameters indicates that all levels of our pyramid share similar semantic levels. This advantage is analogous to that of using a featurized image pyramid, where a common head classifier can be applied to features computed at any image scale.
items.zh: 我们注意到头部的参数在所有特征金字塔层级之间共享；我们还评估了不共享参数的替代方案，并观察到相似的精度。共享参数的良好性能表明我们金字塔的所有层级共享相似的语义水平。这一优势类似于使用特征化图像金字塔，其中公共头部分类器可以应用于任何图像尺度计算的特征。

items.en: With the above adaptations, RPN can be naturally trained and tested with our FPN, in the same fashion as in [29]. We elaborate on the implementation details in the experiments.
items.zh: 通过上述适配，RPN可以自然地使用我们的FPN进行训练和测试，方式与[29]相同。我们在实验中详细说明实现细节。

full.sec: 4.2 Feature Pyramid Networks for Fast R-CNN
full.secZh: 4.2 用于Fast R-CNN的特征金字塔网络

items.en: Fast R-CNN [11] is a region-based object detector in which Region-of-Interest (RoI) pooling is used to extract features. Fast R-CNN is most commonly performed on a single-scale feature map. To use it with our FPN, we need to assign RoIs of different scales to the pyramid levels.
items.zh: Fast R-CNN[11]是一个基于区域的目标检测器，其中使用感兴趣区域（RoI）池化来提取特征。Fast R-CNN最常在单尺度特征图上执行。为了将其与我们的FPN一起使用，我们需要将不同尺度的RoI分配到金字塔层级。

items.en: We view our feature pyramid as if it were produced from an image pyramid. Thus we can adapt the assignment strategy of region-based detectors [15, 11] in the case when they are run on image pyramids. Formally, we assign an RoI of width w𝑤w and height hℎh (on the input image to the network) to the level Pksubscript𝑃𝑘P_{k} of our feature pyramid by:
items.zh: 我们将我们的特征金字塔视为由图像金字塔产生的。因此，我们可以适配基于区域的检测器[15,11]在图像金字塔上运行时的分配策略。形式上，我们将宽度为w、高度为h（在网络的输入图像上）的RoI分配到我们特征金字塔的层级P_k，通过：

items.en: Here 224 is the canonical ImageNet pre-training size, and k0subscript𝑘0k_{0} is the target level on which an RoI with w×h=2242𝑤ℎsuperscript2242w\times h=224^{2} should be mapped into. Analogous to the ResNet-based Faster R-CNN system [16] that uses C4subscript𝐶4C_{4} as the single-scale feature map, we set k0subscript𝑘0k_{0} to 4. Intuitively, Eqn. (1) means that if the RoI’s scale becomes smaller (say, 1/2 of 224), it should be mapped into a finer-resolution level (say, k=3𝑘3k=3).
items.zh: 这里224是标准的ImageNet预训练尺寸，k0是目标层级，一个w×h=224^2的RoI应映射到该层级。类似于基于ResNet的Faster R-CNN系统[16]使用C4作为单尺度特征图，我们将k0设置为4。直观上，公式(1)意味着如果RoI的尺度变小（例如，224的1/2），则应映射到更精细分辨率的层级（例如，k=3）。

items.en: We attach predictor heads (in Fast R-CNN the heads are class-specific classifiers and bounding box regressors) to all RoIs of all levels. Again, the heads all share parameters, regardless of their levels. In [16], a ResNet’s conv5 layers (a 9-layer deep subnetwork) are adopted as the head on top of the conv4 features, but our method has already harnessed conv5 to construct the feature pyramid. So unlike [16], we simply adopt RoI pooling to extract 7×\times7 features, and attach two hidden 1,024-d fully-connected (fc) layers (each followed by ReLU) before the final classification and bounding box regression layers. These layers are randomly initialized, as there are no pre-trained fc layers available in ResNets. Note that compared to the standard conv5 head, our 2-fc MLP head is lighter weight and faster.
items.zh: 我们将预测头部（在Fast R-CNN中，头部是类别特定的分类器和边界框回归器）附加到所有层级的所有RoI上。同样，所有头部共享参数，无论其层级如何。在[16]中，ResNet的conv5层（一个9层深的子网络）被用作conv4特征之上的头部，但我们的方法已经利用conv5构建了特征金字塔。因此，与[16]不同，我们简单地采用RoI池化提取7×7特征，并在最终分类和边界框回归层之前附加两个隐藏的1024维全连接层（每个后跟ReLU）。这些层是随机初始化的，因为ResNet中没有预训练的全连接层。注意，与标准的conv5头部相比，我们的2-fc MLP头部更轻量且更快。

items.en: Based on these adaptations, we can train and test Fast R-CNN on top of the feature pyramid. Implementation details are given in the experimental section.
items.zh: 基于这些适配，我们可以在特征金字塔之上训练和测试Fast R-CNN。实现细节在实验部分给出。

items.en: We perform experiments on the 80 category COCO detection dataset [21]. We train using the union of 80k train images and a 35k subset of val images (trainval35k [2]), and report ablations on a 5k subset of val images (minival). We also report final results on the standard test set (test-std) [21] which has no disclosed labels.
items.zh: 我们在80类COCO检测数据集[21]上进行实验。我们使用80k训练图像和35k验证图像子集（trainval35k [2]）的并集进行训练，并在5k验证图像子集（minival）上报告消融实验。我们还报告了标准测试集（test-std）[21]上的最终结果，该测试集没有公开标签。

items.en: As is common practice [12], all network backbones are pre-trained on the ImageNet1k classification set [33] and then fine-tuned on the detection dataset. We use the pre-trained ResNet-50 and ResNet-101 models that are publicly available.222https://github.com/kaiminghe/deep-residual-networks Our code is a reimplementation of py-faster-rcnn333https://github.com/rbgirshick/py-faster-rcnn using Caffe2.444https://github.com/caffe2/caffe2
items.zh: 按照常见做法[12]，所有网络骨干都在ImageNet1k分类集[33]上预训练，然后在检测数据集上微调。我们使用公开可用的预训练ResNet-50和ResNet-101模型。2https://github.com/kaiminghe/deep-residual-networks 我们的代码是py-faster-rcnn3https://github.com/rbgirshick/py-faster-rcnn 使用Caffe2的重实现。4https://github.com/caffe2/caffe2

items.en: We evaluate the COCO-style Average Recall (AR) and AR on small, medium, and large objects (ARs, ARm, and ARl) following the definitions in [21]. We report results for 100 and 1000 proposals per images (AR100 and AR1k).
items.zh: 我们评估COCO风格的平均召回率（AR）以及小、中、大目标上的AR（ARs、ARm和ARl），遵循[21]中的定义。我们报告每张图像100和1000个提议的结果（AR100和AR1k）。

items.en: All architectures in Table 3 are trained end-to-end. The input image is resized such that its shorter side has 800 pixels. We adopt synchronized SGD training on 8 GPUs. A mini-batch involves 2 images per GPU and 256 anchors per image. We use a weight decay of 0.0001 and a momentum of 0.9. The learning rate is 0.02 for the first 30k mini-batches and 0.002 for the next 10k. For all RPN experiments (including baselines), we include the anchor boxes that are outside the image for training, which is unlike [29] where these anchor boxes are ignored. Other implementation details are as in [29]. Training RPN with FPN on 8 GPUs takes about 8 hours on COCO.
items.zh: 表3中的所有架构都是端到端训练的。输入图像被调整大小，使其较短边为800像素。我们在8个GPU上采用同步SGD训练。每个小批量涉及每个GPU 2张图像和每张图像256个锚点。我们使用权重衰减0.0001和动量0.9。学习率在前30k个小批量中为0.02，在接下来的10k中为0.002。对于所有RPN实验（包括基线），我们包括图像外部的锚点框进行训练，这与[29]中忽略这些锚点框不同。其他实现细节如[29]所述。在COCO上使用FPN训练RPN在8个GPU上大约需要8小时。

items.en: For fair comparisons with original RPNs [29], we run two baselines (Table 3(a, b)) using the single-scale map of C4subscript𝐶4C_{4} (the same as [16]) or C5subscript𝐶5C_{5}, both using the same hyper-parameters as ours, including using 5 scale anchors of {322,642,1282,2562,5122}superscript322superscript642superscript1282superscript2562superscript5122\{32^{2},64^{2},128^{2},256^{2},512^{2}\}. Table 3 (b) shows no advantage over (a), indicating that a single higher-level feature map is not enough because there is a trade-off between coarser resolutions and stronger semantics.
items.zh: 为了与原始RPN [29]进行公平比较，我们使用C4（与[16]相同）或C5的单尺度特征图运行了两个基线（表3(a, b)），两者都使用与我们相同的超参数，包括使用5种尺度锚点{32², 64², 128², 256², 512²}。表3(b)显示与(a)相比没有优势，表明单个更高层特征图是不够的，因为更粗糙的分辨率和更强的语义之间存在权衡。

items.en: Placing FPN in RPN improves AR1k to 56.3 (Table 3 (c)), which is 8.0 points increase over the single-scale RPN baseline (Table 3 (a)). In addition, the performance on small objects (ARs1​ksubscriptsuperscriptabsent1𝑘𝑠{}^{1k}_{s}) is boosted by a large margin of 12.9 points. Our pyramid representation greatly improves RPN’s robustness to object scale variation.
items.zh: 在RPN中放置FPN将AR1k提升至56.3（表3(c)），比单尺度RPN基线（表3(a)）提高了8.0个点。此外，小物体上的性能（ARs¹ᵏ）大幅提升了12.9个点。我们的金字塔表示极大地提高了RPN对物体尺度变化的鲁棒性。

items.en: The results in Table 3(d) are just on par with the RPN baseline and lag far behind ours. We conjecture that this is because there are large semantic gaps between different levels on the bottom-up pyramid (Fig. 1(b)), especially for very deep ResNets. We have also evaluated a variant of Table 3(d) without sharing the parameters of the heads, but observed similarly degraded performance. This issue cannot be simply remedied by level-specific heads.
items.zh: 表3(d)中的结果仅与RPN基线相当，且远落后于我们的结果。我们推测这是因为自底向上金字塔（图1(b)）不同层级之间存在较大的语义差距，尤其是对于非常深的ResNet。我们还评估了表3(d)的一个变体，即不共享头部参数，但观察到类似的性能下降。这个问题不能简单地通过层级特定头部来补救。

items.en: Instead of resorting to pyramid representations, one can attach the head to the highest-resolution, strongly semantic feature maps of P2subscript𝑃2P_{2} (i.e., the finest level in our pyramids). Similar to the single-scale baselines, we assign all anchors to the P2subscript𝑃2P_{2} feature map. This variant (Table 3(f)) is better than the baseline but inferior to our approach. RPN is a sliding window detector with a fixed window size, so scanning over pyramid levels can increase its robustness to scale variance.
items.zh: 除了采用金字塔表示，还可以将头部附加到最高分辨率、强语义的P2特征图（即我们金字塔中最精细的层级）。与单尺度基线类似，我们将所有锚点分配给P2特征图。该变体（表3(f)）优于基线但不如我们的方法。RPN是一个具有固定窗口大小的滑动窗口检测器，因此扫描金字塔层级可以增加其对尺度变化的鲁棒性。

items.en: In addition, we note that using P2subscript𝑃2P_{2} alone leads to more anchors (750k, Table 3(f)) caused by its large spatial resolution. This result suggests that a larger number of anchors is not sufficient in itself to improve accuracy.
items.zh: 此外，我们注意到单独使用P2会导致更多锚点（750k，表3(f)），这是由其较大的空间分辨率引起的。这一结果表明，更多的锚点本身并不足以提高精度。

items.en: Next we investigate FPN for region-based (non-sliding window) detectors. We evaluate object detection by the COCO-style Average Precision (AP) and PASCAL-style AP (at a single IoU threshold of 0.5). We also report COCO AP on objects of small, medium, and large sizes (namely, APs, APm, and APl) following the definitions in [21].
items.zh: 接下来，我们研究FPN用于基于区域（非滑动窗口）的检测器。我们通过COCO风格的平均精度（AP）和PASCAL风格AP（在单一IoU阈值0.5下）评估目标检测。我们还报告了COCO AP在小型、中型和大型物体上的结果（即APs、APm和APl），遵循[21]中的定义。

items.en: The input image is resized such that its shorter side has 800 pixels. Synchronized SGD is used to train the model on 8 GPUs. Each mini-batch involves 2 image per GPU and 512 RoIs per image. We use a weight decay of 0.0001 and a momentum of 0.9. The learning rate is 0.02 for the first 60k mini-batches and 0.002 for the next 20k. We use 2000 RoIs per image for training and 1000 for testing. Training Fast R-CNN with FPN takes about 10 hours on the COCO dataset.
items.zh: 输入图像被调整大小，使其较短边为800像素。使用同步SGD在8个GPU上训练模型。每个小批量包含每GPU 2张图像和每图像512个RoI。我们使用权重衰减0.0001和动量0.9。学习率在前60k个小批量中为0.02，在接下来的20k中为0.002。训练时每张图像使用2000个RoI，测试时使用1000个。在COCO数据集上训练带有FPN的Fast R-CNN大约需要10小时。

items.en: To better investigate FPN’s effects on the region-based detector alone, we conduct ablations of Fast R-CNN on a fixed set of proposals. We choose to freeze the proposals as computed by RPN on FPN (Table 3(c)), because it has good performance on small objects that are to be recognized by the detector. For simplicity we do not share features between Fast R-CNN and RPN, except when specified.
items.zh: 为了更好地单独研究FPN对基于区域检测器的影响，我们在固定提案集上对Fast R-CNN进行消融实验。我们选择冻结由FPN上的RPN计算的提案（表3(c)），因为它在检测器需要识别的小物体上表现良好。为简单起见，除非特别说明，我们不共享Fast R-CNN和RPN之间的特征。

items.en: As a ResNet-based Fast R-CNN baseline, following [16], we adopt RoI pooling with an output size of 14×\times14 and attach all conv5 layers as the hidden layers of the head. This gives an AP of 31.9 in Table 3(a). Table 3(b) is a baseline exploiting an MLP head with 2 hidden fc layers, similar to the head in our architecture. It gets an AP of 28.8, indicating that the 2-fc head does not give us any orthogonal advantage over the baseline in Table 3(a).
items.zh: 作为基于ResNet的Fast R-CNN基线，遵循[16]，我们采用输出大小为14×14的RoI池化，并将所有conv5层作为头部的隐藏层。这给出了表3(a)中31.9的AP。表3(b)是一个利用具有2个隐藏全连接层的MLP头部的基线，类似于我们架构中的头部。它获得了28.8的AP，表明2-fc头部相对于表3(a)中的基线没有提供任何正交优势。

items.en: In Table 3(f), we adopt Fast R-CNN on the single finest scale feature map of P2subscript𝑃2P_{2}. Its result (33.4 AP) is marginally worse than that of using all pyramid levels (33.9 AP, Table 3(c)). We argue that this is because RoI pooling is a warping-like operation, which is less sensitive to the region’s scales. Despite the good accuracy of this variant, it is based on the RPN proposals of {Pk}subscript𝑃𝑘\{P_{k}\} and has thus already benefited from the pyramid representation.
items.zh: 在表3(f)中，我们在单个最精细尺度特征图P2上采用Fast R-CNN。其结果（33.4 AP）略差于使用所有金字塔层级的结果（33.9 AP，表3(c)）。我们认为这是因为RoI池化是一种类似扭曲的操作，对区域的尺度不太敏感。尽管该变体精度不错，但它基于{Pk}的RPN提案，因此已经受益于金字塔表示。

items.en: In the above we used a fixed set of proposals to investigate the detectors. But in a Faster R-CNN system [29], the RPN and Fast R-CNN must use the same network backbone in order to make feature sharing possible. Table 3 shows the comparisons between our method and two baselines, all using consistent backbone architectures for RPN and Fast R-CNN. Table 3(a) shows our reproduction of the baseline Faster R-CNN system as described in [16]. Under controlled settings, our FPN (Table 3(c)) is better than this strong baseline by 2.3 points AP and 3.8 points AP@0.5.
items.zh: 上述我们使用固定提案集来研究检测器。但在Faster R-CNN系统[29]中，RPN和Fast R-CNN必须使用相同的网络骨干以实现特征共享。表3显示了我们的方法与两个基线之间的比较，所有方法都使用一致的骨干架构用于RPN和Fast R-CNN。表3(a)展示了我们对[16]中描述的基线Faster R-CNN系统的复现。在受控设置下，我们的FPN（表3(c)）比这个强基线高出2.3个点AP和3.8个点AP@0.5。

items.en: Note that Table 3(a) and (b) are baselines that are much stronger than the baseline provided by He et al. [16] in Table 3(*). We find the following implementations contribute to the gap: (i) We use an image scale of 800 pixels instead of 600 in [11, 16]; (ii) We train with 512 RoIs per image which accelerate convergence, in contrast to 64 RoIs in [11, 16]; (iii) We use 5 scale anchors instead of 4 in [16] (adding 322superscript32232^{2}); (iv) At test time we use 1000 proposals per image instead of 300 in [16]. So comparing with He et al.’s ResNet-50 Faster R-CNN baseline in Table 3(*), our method improves AP by 7.6 points and AP@0.5 by 9.6 points.
items.zh: 注意，表3(a)和(b)是比He等人[16]在表3(*)中提供的基线强得多的基线。我们发现以下实现导致了差距：(i) 我们使用图像尺度800像素而不是[11,16]中的600；(ii) 我们训练时每张图像使用512个RoI以加速收敛，而[11,16]中使用64个RoI；(iii) 我们使用5种尺度锚点而不是[16]中的4种（增加了32²）；(iv) 测试时我们每张图像使用1000个提案而不是[16]中的300个。因此，与He等人的ResNet-50 Faster R-CNN基线（表3(*)）相比，我们的方法将AP提高了7.6个点，AP@0.5提高了9.6个点。

items.en: In the above, for simplicity we do not share the features between RPN and Fast R-CNN. In Table 5, we evaluate sharing features following the 4-step training described in [29]. Similar to [29], we find that sharing features improves accuracy by a small margin. Feature sharing also reduces the testing time.
items.zh: 上述为简单起见，我们不共享RPN和Fast R-CNN之间的特征。在表5中，我们按照[29]中描述的4步训练评估特征共享。与[29]类似，我们发现特征共享以小幅提升精度。特征共享也减少了测试时间。

items.en: With feature sharing, our FPN-based Faster R-CNN system has inference time of 0.148 seconds per image on a single NVIDIA M40 GPU for ResNet-50, and 0.172 seconds for ResNet-101.666These runtimes are updated from an earlier version of this paper. As a comparison, the single-scale ResNet-50 baseline in Table 3(a) runs at 0.32 seconds. Our method introduces small extra cost by the extra layers in the FPN, but has a lighter weight head. Overall our system is faster than the ResNet-based Faster R-CNN counterpart. We believe the efficiency and simplicity of our method will benefit future research and applications.
items.zh: 通过特征共享，我们基于FPN的Faster R-CNN系统在单个NVIDIA M40 GPU上，对于ResNet-50的推理时间为每张图像0.148秒，对于ResNet-101为0.172秒。作为比较，表3(a)中的单尺度ResNet-50基线运行时间为0.32秒。我们的方法通过FPN中的额外层引入了少量额外成本，但头部更轻量。总体而言，我们的系统比基于ResNet的Faster R-CNN对应物更快。我们相信我们方法的效率和简单性将有益于未来的研究和应用。

items.en: We find that our ResNet-101 model in Table 5 is not sufficiently trained with the default learning rate schedule. So we increase the number of mini-batches by 2×\times at each learning rate when training the Fast R-CNN step. This increases AP on minival to 35.6, without sharing features. This model is the one we submitted to the COCO detection leaderboard, shown in Table 4. We have not evaluated its feature-sharing version due to limited time, which should be slightly better as implied by Table 5.
items.zh: 我们发现表5中的ResNet-101模型在默认学习率计划下训练不足。因此，在训练Fast R-CNN步骤时，我们将每个学习率下的小批量数量增加2倍。这使minival上的AP提高到35.6，且不共享特征。该模型是我们提交到COCO检测排行榜的模型，如表4所示。由于时间有限，我们没有评估其特征共享版本，但如表5所示，该版本应略好一些。

items.en: Moreover, our method does not exploit many popular improvements, such as iterative regression [9], hard negative mining [35], context modeling [16], stronger data augmentation [22], etc. These improvements are complementary to FPNs and should boost accuracy further.
items.zh: 此外，我们的方法没有利用许多流行的改进，如迭代回归[9]、难负例挖掘[35]、上下文建模[16]、更强的数据增强[22]等。这些改进与FPN互补，应能进一步提高精度。

items.en: Recently, FPN has enabled new top results in all tracks of the COCO competition, including detection, instance segmentation, and keypoint estimation. See [14] for details.
items.zh: 最近，FPN在COCO竞赛的所有赛道中实现了新的顶尖结果，包括检测、实例分割和关键点估计。详见[14]。

items.capEn: Figure 4: FPN for object segment proposals. The feature pyramid is constructed with identical structure as for object detection. We apply a small MLP on 5×\times5 windows to generate dense object segments with output dimension of 14×\times14. Shown in orange are the size of the image regions the mask corresponds to for each pyramid level (levels P3−5subscript𝑃35P_{3-5} are shown here). Both the corresponding image region size (light orange) and canonical object size (dark orange) are shown. Half octaves are handled by an MLP on 7x7 windows (7≈5​27527\approx 5\sqrt{2}), not shown here. Details are in the appendix.
items.capZh: 图4：用于物体分割提案的FPN。特征金字塔的构建方式与目标检测相同。我们在5×5窗口上应用一个小型MLP，生成输出维度为14×14的密集物体分割。橙色显示每个金字塔层级（此处显示层级P3-5）掩码对应的图像区域大小。同时显示了对应的图像区域大小（浅橙色）和规范物体大小（深橙色）。半倍频程由7x7窗口上的MLP处理（7≈5√2），此处未显示。详情见附录。

items.en: Our method is a generic pyramid representation and can be used in applications other than object detection. In this section we use FPNs to generate segmentation proposals, following the DeepMask/SharpMask framework [27, 28].
items.zh: 我们的方法是一种通用的金字塔表示，可用于目标检测以外的应用。在本节中，我们使用FPN生成分割提案，遵循DeepMask/SharpMask框架[27, 28]。

items.en: DeepMask/SharpMask were trained on image crops for predicting instance segments and object/non-object scores. At inference time, these models are run convolutionally to generate dense proposals in an image. To generate segments at multiple scales, image pyramids are necessary [27, 28].
items.zh: DeepMask/SharpMask在图像裁剪上训练，用于预测实例分割和物体/非物体分数。在推理时，这些模型以卷积方式运行，在图像中生成密集提案。为了在多个尺度上生成分割，图像金字塔是必要的[27, 28]。

items.en: It is easy to adapt FPN to generate mask proposals. We use a fully convolutional setup for both training and inference. We construct our feature pyramid as in Sec. 5.1 and set d=128𝑑128d=128. On top of each level of the feature pyramid, we apply a small 5×\times5 MLP to predict 14×\times14 masks and object scores in a fully convolutional fashion, see Fig. 4. Additionally, motivated by the use of 2 scales per octave in the image pyramid of [27, 28], we use a second MLP of input size 7×\times7 to handle half octaves. The two MLPs play a similar role as anchors in RPN. The architecture is trained end-to-end; full implementation details are given in the appendix.
items.zh: 将FPN调整为生成掩膜提议是容易的。我们采用全卷积设置进行训练和推理。如第5.1节所述构建特征金字塔，并设置d=128。在特征金字塔的每一层顶部，我们应用一个小的5×5 MLP，以全卷积方式预测14×14掩膜和物体分数，见图4。此外，受[27,28]中图像金字塔每倍频程使用2个尺度的启发，我们使用第二个输入大小为7×7的MLP来处理半倍频程。这两个MLP的作用类似于RPN中的锚点。该架构是端到端训练的；完整实现细节见附录。

items.en: Results are shown in Table 6. We report segment AR and segment AR on small, medium, and large objects, always for 1000 proposals. Our baseline FPN model with a single 5×\times5 MLP achieves an AR of 43.4. Switching to a slightly larger 7×\times7 MLP leaves accuracy largely unchanged. Using both MLPs together increases accuracy to 45.7 AR. Increasing mask output size from 14×\times14 to 28×\times28 increases AR another point (larger sizes begin to degrade accuracy). Finally, doubling the training iterations increases AR to 48.1.
items.zh: 结果如表6所示。我们报告了分割AR以及小、中、大物体上的分割AR，始终针对1000个提议。我们的基线FPN模型使用单个5×5 MLP，AR为43.4。切换到稍大的7×7 MLP，精度基本不变。同时使用两个MLP将精度提高到45.7 AR。将掩膜输出大小从14×14增加到28×28，AR再提高一个点（更大的尺寸开始降低精度）。最后，将训练迭代次数加倍，AR提高到48.1。

items.en: We also report comparisons to DeepMask [27], SharpMask [28], and InstanceFCN [4], the previous state of the art methods in mask proposal generation. We outperform the accuracy of these approaches by over 8.3 points AR. In particular, we nearly double the accuracy on small objects.
items.zh: 我们还与DeepMask [27]、SharpMask [28]和InstanceFCN [4]（先前掩膜提议生成的最先进方法）进行了比较。我们的精度超过这些方法8.3个AR点以上。特别是，我们在小物体上的精度几乎翻倍。

items.en: Existing mask proposal methods [27, 28, 4] are based on densely sampled image pyramids (e.g., scaled by 2{−2:0.5:1}superscript2conditional-set2:0.512^{\{-2:0.5:1\}} in [27, 28]), making them computationally expensive. Our approach, based on FPNs, is substantially faster (our models run at 6 to 7 FPS). These results demonstrate that our model is a generic feature extractor and can replace image pyramids for other multi-scale detection problems.
items.zh: 现有的掩膜提议方法[27,28,4]基于密集采样的图像金字塔（例如，在[27,28]中按2^{−2:0.5:1}缩放），计算成本高。我们基于FPN的方法速度更快（模型运行速度为6到7 FPS）。这些结果表明，我们的模型是一个通用的特征提取器，可以替代图像金字塔用于其他多尺度检测问题。

items.en: We have presented a clean and simple framework for building feature pyramids inside ConvNets. Our method shows significant improvements over several strong baselines and competition winners. Thus, it provides a practical solution for research and applications of feature pyramids, without the need of computing image pyramids. Finally, our study suggests that despite the strong representational power of deep ConvNets and their implicit robustness to scale variation, it is still critical to explicitly address multi-scale problems using pyramid representations.
items.zh: 我们提出了一个简洁的框架，用于在ConvNet内部构建特征金字塔。我们的方法在多个强基线和竞赛获胜者之上显示出显著改进。因此，它为特征金字塔的研究和应用提供了一个实用的解决方案，无需计算图像金字塔。最后，我们的研究表明，尽管深度ConvNet具有强大的表示能力以及对尺度变化的隐式鲁棒性，但使用金字塔表示显式处理多尺度问题仍然至关重要。

full.sec: Appendix A Implementation of Segmentation Proposals
full.secZh: 附录A 分割提议的实现

items.en: We use our feature pyramid networks to efficiently generate object segment proposals, adopting an image-centric training strategy popular for object detection [11, 29]. Our FPN mask generation model inherits many of the ideas and motivations from DeepMask/SharpMask [27, 28]. However, in contrast to these models, which were trained on image crops and used a densely sampled image pyramid for inference, we perform fully-convolutional training for mask prediction on a feature pyramid. While this requires changing many of the specifics, our implementation remains similar in spirit to DeepMask. Specifically, to define the label of a mask instance at each sliding window, we think of this window as being a crop on the input image, allowing us to inherit definitions of positives/negatives from DeepMask. We give more details next, see also Fig. 4 for a visualization.
items.zh: 我们使用特征金字塔网络高效生成物体分割提议，采用了目标检测中流行的以图像为中心的训练策略[11,29]。我们的FPN掩膜生成模型继承了许多来自DeepMask/SharpMask [27,28]的思想和动机。然而，与这些模型（在图像裁剪上训练，并在推理时使用密集采样的图像金字塔）不同，我们在特征金字塔上进行掩膜预测的全卷积训练。虽然这需要改变许多具体细节，但我们的实现精神上与DeepMask相似。具体来说，为了定义每个滑动窗口处掩膜实例的标签，我们将该窗口视为输入图像上的裁剪，从而允许我们从DeepMask继承正/负样本的定义。接下来我们给出更多细节，另见图4的可视化。

items.en: We construct the feature pyramid with P2−6subscript𝑃26P_{2-6} using the same architecture as described in Sec. 5.1. We set d=128𝑑128d=128. Each level of our feature pyramid is used for predicting masks at a different scale. As in DeepMask, we define the scale of a mask as the max of its width and height. Masks with scales of {32,64,128,256,512}3264128256512\{32,64,128,256,512\} pixels map to {P2,P3,P4,P5,P6}subscript𝑃2subscript𝑃3subscript𝑃4subscript𝑃5subscript𝑃6\{P_{2},P_{3},P_{4},P_{5},P_{6}\}, respectively, and are handled by a 5×\times5 MLP. As DeepMask uses a pyramid with half octaves, we use a second slightly larger MLP of size 7×\times7 (7≈5​27527\approx 5\sqrt{2}) to handle half-octaves in our model (e.g., a 128​21282128\sqrt{2} scale mask is predicted by the 7×\times7 MLP on P4subscript𝑃4P_{4}). Objects at intermediate scales are mapped to the nearest scale in log space.
items.zh: 我们使用与第5.1节相同的架构构建P2-6的特征金字塔。设置d=128。特征金字塔的每一层用于在不同尺度上预测掩膜。与DeepMask一样，我们将掩膜的尺度定义为其宽度和高度的最大值。尺度为{32,64,128,256,512}像素的掩膜分别映射到{P2,P3,P4,P5,P6}，并由5×5 MLP处理。由于DeepMask使用半倍频程的金字塔，我们使用第二个稍大的7×7 MLP（7≈5√2）来处理我们模型中的半倍频程（例如，尺度为128√2的掩膜由P4上的7×7 MLP预测）。中间尺度的物体在对数空间映射到最近的尺度。

items.en: As the MLP must predict objects at a range of scales for each pyramid level (specifically a half octave range), some padding must be given around the canonical object size. We use 25% padding. This means that the mask output over {P2,P3,P4,P5,P6}subscript𝑃2subscript𝑃3subscript𝑃4subscript𝑃5subscript𝑃6\{P_{2},P_{3},P_{4},P_{5},P_{6}\} maps to {40,80,160,320,640}4080160320640\{40,80,160,320,640\} sized image regions for the 5×\times5 MLP (and to 22\sqrt{2} larger corresponding sizes for the 7×\times7 MLP).
items.zh: 由于MLP必须为每个金字塔层级预测一定尺度范围（具体为半倍频程范围）的物体，必须在规范物体大小周围提供一些填充。我们使用25%的填充。这意味着在{P2,P3,P4,P5,P6}上的掩膜输出映射到大小为{40,80,160,320,640}的图像区域（对于5×5 MLP），以及对应大√2倍的尺寸（对于7×7 MLP）。

items.en: Each spatial position in the feature map is used to predict a mask at a different location. Specifically, at scale Pksubscript𝑃𝑘P_{k}, each spatial position in the feature map is used to predict the mask whose center falls within 2ksuperscript2𝑘2^{k} pixels of that location (corresponding to ±1plus-or-minus1\pm 1 cell offset in the feature map). If no object center falls within this range, the location is considered a negative, and, as in DeepMask, is used only for training the score branch and not the mask branch.
items.zh: 特征图中的每个空间位置用于预测不同位置的掩膜。具体来说，在尺度Pk处，特征图中的每个空间位置用于预测中心落在该位置2^k像素范围内的掩膜（对应于特征图中±1个单元的偏移）。如果没有物体中心落在这个范围内，则该位置被视为负样本，并且与DeepMask一样，仅用于训练分数分支，而不用于掩膜分支。

items.en: The MLP we use for predicting the mask and score is fairly simple. We apply a 5×\times5 kernel with 512 outputs, followed by sibling fully connected layers to predict a 14×\times14 mask (142superscript14214^{2} outputs) and object score (1 output). The model is implemented in a fully convolutional manner (using 1×\times1 convolutions in place of fully connected layers). The 7×\times7 MLP for handling objects at half octave scales is identical to the 5×\times5 MLP except for its larger input region.
items.zh: 我们用于预测掩膜和分数的MLP相当简单。我们应用一个5×5卷积核，输出512个通道，然后接兄弟全连接层，预测14×14掩膜（14^2个输出）和物体分数（1个输出）。该模型以全卷积方式实现（使用1×1卷积代替全连接层）。用于处理半倍频程物体的7×7 MLP与5×5 MLP相同，只是输入区域更大。

items.en: During training, we randomly sample 2048 examples per mini-batch (128 examples per image from 16 images) with a positive/negative sampling ratio of 1:3. The mask loss is given 10×\times higher weight than the score loss. This model is trained end-to-end on 8 GPUs using synchronized SGD (2 images per GPU). We start with a learning rate of 0.03 and train for 80k mini-batches, dividing the learning rate by 10 after 60k mini-batches. The image scale is set to 800 pixels during training and testing (we do not use scale jitter). During inference our fully-convolutional model predicts scores at all positions and scales and masks at the 1000 highest scoring locations. We do not perform any non-maximum suppression or post-processing.
items.zh: 在训练期间，我们每个小批量随机采样2048个样本（16张图像，每张图像128个样本），正负样本比例为1:3。掩膜损失的权重是分数损失的10倍。该模型在8个GPU上使用同步SGD（每个GPU 2张图像）进行端到端训练。初始学习率为0.03，训练80k个小批量，在60k个小批量后将学习率除以10。训练和测试时图像尺度设置为800像素（我们不使用尺度抖动）。推理时，我们的全卷积模型在所有位置和尺度预测分数，并在1000个最高得分位置预测掩膜。我们不进行任何非极大值抑制或后处理。
